task_completion.description: Perform an internal link equity audit for the target website.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An SEO auditing tool (such as Screaming Frog SEO Spider) is open and shows a completed or in-progress crawl of 'https://books.toscrape.com/'.

task_completion.description: Export the internal link data to the specified exports directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal window, or save dialog showing an exported file (e.g., CSV or Excel) located in '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/'.

task_completion.description: Save a text report to the specified reports directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or file manager showing a file named 'internal_links_report.txt' located in '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/'.

task_completion.description: Include the total number of internal links and the top 5 most-linked pages in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'internal_links_report.txt' are visible, displaying a numeric total for internal links found and a distinct list of the top 5 most-linked pages.

task_completion.description: Include examples of under-linked pages and an analysis of the most common anchor text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'internal_links_report.txt' show specific examples/URLs of under-linked pages and a section analyzing the most frequently used anchor texts.

task_completion.description: Include at least 3 specific recommendations for improving the internal linking structure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'internal_links_report.txt' display a list (bulleted or numbered) containing at least 3 distinct, actionable recommendations for internal linking.

integrity.description: The agent used a genuine SEO auditing GUI tool (like Screaming Frog) rather than just writing a mock report from scratch.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the interface of an SEO crawler tool with actual crawl data populated, rather than just a text editor or a web browser.

integrity.description: The data in the export and report corresponds to the actual target website.
integrity.visual_evidence: URLs visible in the crawler tool, exported data, and the text report should match the structure of 'books.toscrape.com' (e.g., containing paths like '/catalogue/'), not generic placeholder text like 'example.com/page1'.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply copy-paste a pre-written response.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report's statistics (total links, top pages) should logically align with the data visible in the SEO crawler tool's interface or the exported CSV.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL is https://books.toscrape.com/. The exported internal link data must be in /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/ and typically contains 'Source', 'Destination', and 'Anchor' columns (often generated via Screaming Frog SEO Spider). The final report must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/internal_links_report.txt and be at least 500 bytes in length, containing real data extracted from the target website.
